title: coleus parvicalyx
intro: Coleus parvicalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the small calyx coleus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Coleus parvicalyx include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Coleus parvicalyx typically involve making a tea from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
